name: stale
description: Find the outdated apps on your Mac, privately. A free, no-install, client-side replacement for MacUpdater that checks your apps against Homebrew's live version database.

scripts.test: echo "Tests run in-browser via the window.Stale debug API — see docs/TESTING.md" && exit 0

engines.note: No runtime dependency. Any static file server works; Python's http.server is used for local dev.
